source_or_gap: Pinned local Corben's Best Model Possible snapshot: shared-weight recurrent architecture laboratory, fixed-feature adapter training, lane-specific checkpoint banks, semantic compiler, memory/router/governance/tool/speech/evaluation subsystems, and implementation gaps between interfaces, effects, and metric claims.
chapter_action_policy: Use the repository as a bounded implementation and negative-case reference across existing chapters. Preserve the distinction between deterministic feature experiments, adapter learning, runtime integration, and general capability. Do not add a project-specific model chapter or promote support state.
merge_or_split_policy: Merge recurrence, specialist banks, compiler, memory, router, verification, tool, provenance, benchmark, and improvement-loop lessons into their current owners. Defer a distinct metric-provenance or causal-capability-receipt boundary until the cross-project synthesis pass.
boundary_decision_rationale: The project spans many stack layers, but its useful concepts have existing chapter homes. Its unifying contribution is an evidence lesson—interfaces and reports must be causally connected to observed effects—which should first strengthen the evidence and benchmark spine rather than create a repository-shaped chapter.
external_literature_need: universal and recurrent transformers, parameter sharing, adaptive computation, and overthinking
mixture-of-experts routing, oracle routing, router calibration, and interference measurement
parameter-efficient fine-tuning, linear mode connectivity, checkpoint composition, and adapter merging
causal mediation and provenance from model weights to generated outputs
semantic compilation, refinement, contract preservation, and incremental repair
transactional durable memory, event sourcing, content addressing, and crash consistency
sandbox capability enforcement and deterministic replay
measurement theory, metric provenance, benchmark validity, and missing-data policy
speech recognition and synthesis evaluation separating codec round trips from linguistic capability
proof_or_test_backlog: restore the requested Rust toolchain and offline dependencies, then reproduce workspace tests and Clippy with build output outside the source tree
build a minimal end-to-end test proving whether a trained checkpoint causally changes decoded runtime response text
ablate the position-specific byte-bias table and measure its contribution to low-rank sequence results
reject exact-sequence evaluation when the selected backend emits one repeated token distribution
relocate a promoted adapter bank and prove content-addressed resolution without rewriting absolute paths
evaluate a held-out autonomous router against oracle, single-adapter, and compute-matched baselines
replace digest-string parity with field-level contract lineage and adversarial semantic preservation tests
restart after freeze, thaw, tier rebalance, reserve promotion, and compaction and verify material state
enforce tool capability envelopes with operating-system path, executable, network, write, clock, randomness, and resource controls
distinguish playback from live re-execution and require output or side-effect comparison
label every evaluation metric by origin and fail missing provenance to unknown
evaluate speech on natural human audio and intelligibility rather than self-generated tone fixtures
evidence_transition_precondition: claim-specific source and retained-artifact mapping complete
trainable and actually updated state enumerated
runtime response causally bound to the claimed checkpoint and decode path
metric origin and verification method machine-readable
independent literature and evaluator evidence reviewed
accepted transition record required for any support-state change
required_before_drafting: complete cross-project provenance, contradiction, and terminology deduplication
word all retained losses as local adapter-validation observations
redact private machine paths, raw corpus data, model states, optimizer states, and unpublished artifacts
distinguish source-reported historical green checks from reproduced current validation
promotion_blockers: current workspace tests were not reproduced because offline dependencies and the requested toolchain were unavailable
the surviving artifact corpus is incomplete relative to the pinned commit
the inspected serious path freezes the recurrent trunk and trains only small adapters
no general checkpoint-driven text-generation loop was established
lane selection depends on explicit metadata rather than autonomous prompt routing
promoted bank paths are absolute and non-relocatable in the current loader
ordinary runtime integration uses default, empty, scaffold, or manifest-only subsystem state
compiler semantic parity, memory durability, replay, and capability enforcement are incomplete
several evaluation metrics are declared, modeled, constant, proxy, or vacuous
speech evidence is a tone/symbol codec rather than general speech
independent literature, evaluators, and source-publication permission remain incomplete
residuals: exact cross-project origin of route, memory, compiler, tribunal, and governance concepts remains to be mapped
the complete pinned-commit artifact corpus was not reconstituted after cleanup
actual hardware and MLX behavior was not reproduced
external specialist integration was not executed
newly extracted intake projects may repair, supersede, or duplicate these mechanisms
next_action: Perform the all-project synthesis and symbol/provenance deduplication pass, then rescan the intake directory before closing the mining program.
non_claims: does not claim a trained foundation model, full-trunk learning, or parameter efficiency
does not claim general text generation, autonomous routing, or external benchmark performance
does not treat adapter loss improvements as general capability evidence
does not claim semantic compilation correctness, durable memory, complete sandboxing, or live deterministic replay
does not claim natural speech, measured latency, recursive compounding, safety, AGI, or ASI
does not add a new chapter or promote an ASI Stack support state
